principle: Display factual author bio on every article — consistent authorship across the site is a key trust signal for AI
explanation: X.seo|author_bio: author == point_of_accountability_for_AI; bio_must_be: factual + short + credentials + field_of_work; same_author_format_across_all_pages == systematic; inconsistent_authorship (present_on_some_pages_absent_on_others) == unsystematic_project; NO:marketing_bio NO:missing_author NO:pseudonyms_on_expert_content eg: "article_without_author_name" >> "Author:_Jane_Smith_CTO_at_X_10_years_in_fintech + same_format_sitewide"

principle: Build a topic cluster of supporting pages around each key page — analytics, FAQ, case studies prove depth to AI
explanation: X.seo|evidence_pages: key_page_alone == shallow; surround_with: analytical_articles (cause+effect) + explainer_pages (mechanism) + full_FAQ (10-20_questions) + case_studies (situation+steps+result) + narrow_subtopic_pages; internal_links: product_page -> explainer -> FAQ -> back_to_product; model_sees_cluster == domain_expertise; NO:isolated_pages NO:unrelated_content_nearby eg: "single_service_page_no_supporting_content" >> "service_page + how_it_works + FAQ + 3_case_studies + comparison_article"

principle: Self-diagnose page AI-readiness with 12-point checklist before publishing: intent match, clear start, citable fragments, clean H2, no contradictions
